name: Golden Fish Fillets
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb - 2 lbs white fleshed fish fillets (sole, flounder, perch, orange roughy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the egg, mustard, and salt in a shallow dish.
2. Put the potato flakes in another shallow dish.
3. Dip each fish fillet in the egg mixture, then roll it in potato flakes to coat evenly.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet.
5. Fry the fish fillets for 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown and easy to flake with a fork.
